prompt_text:
### Demographics: 79-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Mild Cognitive Impairment with early Dementia
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 1 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.3 kg; Height 173.6 cm; BMI 32.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 127/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 8.2%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 176mg/dL; 9 months ago 191mg/dL; 6 months ago 205mg/dL; 3 months ago 180mg/dL; current 219mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 100.1kg; 9 months ago 101.1kg; 6 months ago 95.9kg; 3 months ago 94.1kg; current 97.3kg), Height (12 months ago 173.6cm; 9 months ago 173.6cm; 6 months ago 173.6cm; 3 months ago 173.6cm; current 173.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 128mmHg; 3 months ago 128mmHg; current 127mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 16U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 19U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 23mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 664mg/g; 9 months ago 709mg/g; 6 months ago 546mg/g; 3 months ago 603mg/g; current 752mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 97mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 46mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 158mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 163mg/dL; 3 months ago 176mg/dL; current 170mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.3g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.7g/dL; current 11.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 2.16 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
